category_sources: source_facts.description says flarectl is a CLI application for interacting with a Cloudflare account.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is flarectl; official Cloudflare repository path cmd/flarectl uses the same command name.
docs_sources: Official Cloudflare cloudflare-go repository README for cmd/flarectl.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/cloudflare/cloudflare-go, so repo lookup was skipped per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official Cloudflare cmd/flarectl README describe Cloudflare account operations from a CLI.
